src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Replace the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.x requirements for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: Changed import and annotation from EnableGlobalMethodSecurity to EnableMethodSecurity

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Migrate the EntityManagerFactory import from the javax.persistence package to the jakarta.persistence package to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the newer Spring Boot version.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain beans to comply with Spring Security 6+ API changes required for JDK 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: public SecurityFilterChain restFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception { ... return http.build(); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Switch from authorizeRequests().antMatchers() to authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() and use WebExpressionAuthorizationManager for access rules.
Replace WebSecurity.ignoring() configuration inside adapter with a dedicated WebSecurityCustomizer bean.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.human_impl: @Bean public WebSecurityCustomizer webSecurityCustomizer() { return web -> web.ignoring().requestMatchers(...); }

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/viewem/con.general_idea: Update static import from BASE_USER_ROLE to BASE_USER_AUTHORITY to match updated constant naming in dependencies.
Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
